title: Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions:
Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
